document_references.description: Documents Aisha's annual influenza vaccination visit. Records abbreviated vitals, confirms no acute illness or contraindications to vaccination, documents influenza vaccine administration details (quadrivalent inactivated, 0.5 mL IM left deltoid), 15-minute post-vaccination observation without adverse reaction, and assessment of stable asthma and food allergies with plan to continue current medications.

Formal immunization administration record documenting the influenza vaccine given, including lot number, VIS date, administration site and route, and provider. Updated immunization history reflecting this annual influenza dose.
